case_title: NAJIB REBIA VS. 1145 POLK LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100024179) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REBIA, NAJIB

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REBIA, NAJIB AS TO DEFENDANT 1145 POLK LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-19-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-17-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100024226) WITH EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-17-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); OR FILE DISMISSAL. THE OCT-17-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
